We currently have a WinrateStatsProvider here src\server\dsstats.dbServices\Stats\StatsService.cs with its representation in src\common\dsstats.weblib\Stats\WinrateComponent.razor
We want to add a SynergyStatsProvider (in a seperate file) which provides the stats for one specific commander relative to the commanders in the same team
Sample query (MySQL):
select 
	rp.Race,
    t.Race,
    count(*) as Games,
    sum(case when rp.Result = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as Wins,
    sum(case when rp.Result = 1 then 1 else 0 end) * 1.0 / count(*) as Winrate,
    round(avg(rpr.RatingDelta), 2) as AvgGain
from Replays as r
inner join ReplayPlayers as rp 
    on rp.ReplayId = r.ReplayId
inner join ReplayPlayers as t 
    on t.ReplayId = r.ReplayId
inner join ReplayPlayerRatings as rpr 
    on rpr.ReplayPlayerId = rp.ReplayPlayerId
where 
    r.Gametime > '2026-01-01' 
    and r.GameMode = 3
    and r.PlayerCount = 6
    and rp.Race > 3 -- commaders commander only (<=3 for standard)
    and t.Race > 3 
    and t.TeamId = rp.TeamId 
    and t.ReplayPlayerId != rp.ReplayPlayerId
group by 
    rp.Race, t.Race;

Existing filters in StatsRequest should be applied, the result should be cached
The representation should be a table and a radar chart where you can freely add and remove specific commander datasets (two overlapping datasets let the user identify good 3rd picks)
For the radar chart we should normalize the average rating gains (0-1) accross all results to ensure always positive values.
